blocks.text: Hovland Tees Up at TPC Sawgrass as Arsenal's Title Push Continues

Friday delivers a feast: golf's unofficial fifth major opens at TPC Sawgrass, Arsenal defend their seven-point lead at home, and Norwegian cycling hopes Leknessund and Wærenskjold grind through Italy. Big day.
⛳ THE PLAYERS Championship tees off at TPC Sawgrass — Hovland and Reitan fly the Norwegian flag at the PGA Tour's richest stage
🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico Stage — Leknessund and Wærenskjold chase early-season glory across Italian roads
🎮 ESL Pro League S22 — rain (FaZe) back in action as Norway's CS2 icon hunts another big result
🏎️ Chinese Grand Prix — Shanghai opens 2026 pecking order with Russell leading early championship standings
